title: PlantMind Demo Process Line
description: Interactive P&ID showing the demo process line, monitored assets, valves, and instrumentation.

nodes.label: Feed Line
nodes.description: Process feed inlet entering the PlantMind demo process line.

nodes.label: V-101 Isolation Valve
nodes.description: Isolation valve upstream of the cooling-water circulation pump.

nodes.label: FT-101 Flow Transmitter
nodes.description: Flow transmitter monitoring inlet flow toward P-101.

nodes.label: P-101 Pump
nodes.description: Cooling Water Circulation Pump. High vibration, bearing-temperature warning, abnormal noise, and missing lubrication evidence.

nodes.label: C-201 Compressor
nodes.description: Process Air Compressor. Decreasing RUL, outlet-temperature warning, unstable pressure ratio, and delayed filter verification.

nodes.label: PT-201 Pressure Transmitter
nodes.description: Pressure transmitter monitoring compressor discharge pressure.

nodes.label: HX-301 Heat Exchanger
nodes.description: Feed Preheater Heat Exchanger. High pressure drop, low outlet temperature, reduced efficiency, and overdue cleaning evidence.

nodes.label: TT-301 Temperature Transmitter
nodes.description: Temperature transmitter monitoring the heat exchanger outlet.

nodes.label: V-201 Outlet Valve
nodes.description: Outlet isolation valve downstream of HX-301.

nodes.label: Outlet Line
nodes.description: Final outlet from the PlantMind demo process line.
